tasks.title: Create database migration for tmlo JSON column
acceptance_criteria: WHEN the database migration runs THEN openregister_objects has a tmlo column of type JSON, nullable, default NULL

tasks.title: Add tmlo property to ObjectEntity
acceptance_criteria: WHEN an object is created in a TMLO-enabled register THEN it has a tmlo field in @self metadata

tasks.title: Update ObjectEntity serialization for tmlo
acceptance_criteria: WHEN an object with TMLO metadata is serialized THEN tmlo field appears in @self

tasks.title: Create TmloService with constants and helpers
acceptance_criteria: WHEN a controller or service needs TMLO functionality THEN TmloService is available via DI

tasks.title: Implement populateDefaults method
acceptance_criteria: WHEN an object is created in a TMLO-enabled register THEN tmlo field is populated with schema defaults
WHEN bewaarTermijn is set and no archiefactiedatum THEN archiefactiedatum is calculated

tasks.title: Implement validateStatusTransition method
acceptance_criteria: WHEN actief->semi_statisch THEN accepted
WHEN semi_statisch->overgebracht with missing classificatie THEN 422
WHEN actief->overgebracht directly THEN 422

tasks.title: Implement validateFieldValues method
acceptance_criteria: WHEN invalid archiefnominatie value THEN 422 with valid values listed
WHEN valid ISO-8601 duration THEN accepted

tasks.title: Hook TmloService into object create pipeline
acceptance_criteria: WHEN object is created in TMLO-enabled register THEN TmloService populates defaults automatically

tasks.title: Hook TmloService validation into object update pipeline
acceptance_criteria: WHEN object tmlo status changes THEN validation rules are enforced

tasks.title: Implement generateMdtoXml for single object
acceptance_criteria: WHEN export requested for object with TMLO THEN valid MDTO XML returned
WHEN export requested for object without TMLO THEN 422 error

tasks.title: Implement generateBatchMdtoXml for batch export
acceptance_criteria: WHEN batch export requested THEN XML with multiple object elements returned

tasks.title: Add MDTO export routes and controller action
acceptance_criteria: WHEN GET /api/objects/{r}/{s}/{id}/export/mdto THEN XML response with Content-Type application/xml

tasks.title: Add TMLO query filter support
acceptance_criteria: WHEN tmlo.archiefstatus=semi_statisch THEN only matching objects returned
WHEN tmlo.archiefactiedatum[from] and [to] THEN date range filtered

tasks.title: Implement archival status summary endpoint
acceptance_criteria: WHEN GET /tmlo/summary THEN counts per archiefstatus returned
WHEN register without TMLO THEN 400 error

tasks.title: TmloService unit tests
acceptance_criteria: Unit tests for populateDefaults, validateStatusTransition, validateFieldValues

tasks.title: MDTO XML export unit tests
acceptance_criteria: Unit tests for generateMdtoXml, generateBatchMdtoXml, missing metadata error

tasks.title: ObjectEntity tmlo field unit tests
acceptance_criteria: Unit tests for hydration, serialization, getter defaults of tmlo field
